StageARecord.description: Raw model envelope for a single page OCR run.

fields.page_fingerprint: str — blake3 hex digest of rendered page image
fields.source_pdf: str — absolute path to source PDF
fields.prompt: str — prompt sent to the model
fields.content_hash: str — blake3 hex digest of raw_markdown

SurfaceASTNode.description: Structural tree node in the page surface AST.

fields.node_type: Literal[heading, paragraph, table, list, callout, sidebar, footnote, image_ref, root]
fields.source_line_start: int — 0-based start line in raw markdown

SurfaceAST.description: Top-level container for a page's structural AST.

fields.content_hash: str — blake3 of deterministic JSON serialisation

EvidenceUnit.description: Prose-bound provenance unit. The only admissible input to Stage C.

fields.structural_path: list[str] — heading ancestry from AST root

fields.fingerprint: str — blake3 hex digest of image bytes

GateDiagnostic.description: Result of a single quality gate check.

GraphDelta: Deferred — Stage C. Will be designed against real EvidenceUnits per Mark III sequence.
